description_long: This potted plant features a dense cluster of broad, dark green leaves forming a rounded mound, interspersed with several large, spherical flower clusters. The flowers are predominantly shades of purple and blue, resembling hydrangea blooms, and are distributed evenly across the foliage. The leaves have a jagged, pointed shape and a matte finish, giving the plant a lush and healthy appearance. No pot or container is visible, as the foliage and flowers completely obscure the base. The plant appears well-maintained and ornamental, suitable for decorative use in urban environments such as parks or sidewalks. There are no visible labels, decorations, or additional accessories attached to the plant.
description: A lush, rounded potted plant with dense, jagged dark green leaves and large purple-blue hydrangea-like flower clusters. The foliage fully covers the base, making the pot itself invisible.
description_view_0: Dense green leaves and several prominent purple-blue flower clusters, with one large flower visible on the left side.
description_view_1: More flower clusters are visible, especially towards the back left, with the foliage appearing slightly more compact.
description_view_2: The plant appears more symmetrical, with flower clusters evenly distributed and the leaves forming a rounded mound.
description_view_3: A large purple flower cluster is prominent on the right, with the foliage and other flowers forming a balanced, rounded shape.
